---
title: "02_analy_df"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: pdf_document
---

#load merged data
#535 have outcome data
#378 with exposure and outcome (128 from HOME and 250 from MIREC)
```{r}
merged_df<- read_csv("E:/BBK17/pj/basc_7y/data/basc_7y_df.csv") |>
  filter(!if_any(41:44, is.na)) |>
  filter(!if_any(2:30, is.na)) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))
```
